results.title: LIVE - VP Sara Duterte's legal counsel Michael Poa presscon (June 25, 2026) - Replay | GMA News
results.description: Michael Poa, legal counsel for Vice President Sara Duterte, holds a press conference on the fifth day of the pre-trial conference for the impeachment case against the Vice President. Get the latest breaking news and stories in the Philippines and around the world from GMA News Online.
